user.description: Select the Run-Chicken door to add.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the Run-Chicken door {name}?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Make sure the door is powered on and within Bluetooth range, then try again.

abort.not_run_chicken_device: The discovered device is not a Run-Chicken door.

data.record_raw_bytes: Record raw door data to a file

data_description.record_raw_bytes: When enabled, every raw message exchanged with the door (received and sent) is appended (timestamp + RX/TX + base64) to run_chicken_<address>.log in your Home Assistant config folder. Attach that file when reporting an issue. Leave off for normal use.
